test_sufficiency_summary: Acceptance-criteria coverage is adequate for the new GUI runner, build targets, and modal auto-dismiss path, but tests/gui/GuiHarnessTest.cpp:23-25 only smoke-tests pumpEvents() and does not assert observable event dispatch.
documentation_accuracy_summary: AGENTS.md and .github/copilot-instructions.md accurately describe the new GuiTests runner, the separate make gui-tests build target, and the display/xvfb-run requirement for headless execution.
